steps.title: Identify the antecedent
steps.content: The blank requires a pronoun referring to “the substance” (chicken fat from the previous sentence) — a singular, non-human noun.

steps.title: Apply pronoun-antecedent agreement
steps.content:
A pronoun must agree with its antecedent in number. “It” is the standard singular pronoun for non-human nouns. “Those” and “they” are plural, violating number agreement, and “that” is a demonstrative pronoun less natural for neutral back-reference.

This matches choice D — D is correct.
